scripts.build:
node -e "console.error('
Railway: Settings → Root Directory must be backend, app, or admin (not repo root).
See docs/RAILWAY_DEPLOY.md
'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix admin && npm install --prefix app
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix admin" "npm run dev --prefix app"
